title: Evolvinggrasp: Evolutionary Grasp Generation Via Efficient Preference Alignment
title_zh: EvolvingGrasp：通过高效偏好对齐的进化式抓取生成
abstract: Dexterous robotic hands often struggle to generalize effectively in complex environments due to models trained on low-diversity data. However, the real world presents an inherently unbounded range of scenarios. A natural solution is to enable robots learning from experience in complex environments-an approach akin to evolution, where systems improve through learning from both failures and successes. Motivated by this, we propose EvolvingGrasp, an evolutionary grasp generation method that continuously enhances grasping performance through efficient preference alignment. Specifically, we introduce Handpose-wise
abstract_zh: 灵巧机器手由于在低多样性数据上训练，往往难以在复杂环境中有效泛化。然而，现实世界呈现出本质上无限范围的场景。一个自然的解决方案是让机器人在复杂环境中从经验中学习——这种方法类似于进化，系统通过从失败和成功中学习来改进。受此启发，我们提出EvolvingGrasp，一种通过高效偏好对齐持续提升抓取性能的进化式抓取生成方法。具体而言，我们引入了Handpose-wise偏好对齐机制，使抓取策略能够根据偏好反馈逐步进化，从而在多样化的场景中生成更优的抓取姿态。实验表明，该方法在仿真和真实机器人上均显著提升了抓取成功率。
tldr_zh: 提出EvolvingGrasp，通过偏好对齐让机器手像进化一样持续提升抓取能力。
cover_zh: 机器手也能进化？这个新方法让抓取越学越强！
